transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete statistics, a familiar eating scenario, and a personal conversion story add texture, but insistent claims, recurring analogies, emphatic headings, and repeated instructions make the long chapter feel coercive and padded.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete statistics, a familiar eating scenario, and a personal conversion story add texture, but insistent claims, recurring analogies, emphatic headings, and repeated instructions make the long chapter feel coercive and padded.

parsed.generic_mechanism: There is no craft difference: identical sequencing, repetition, formatting, and recap structure produce the same reading experience.
